subsections.title: Highlight Cards
content: - Contract review completed within 30 minutes: The overall workflow is 80%-90% more efficient than traditional methods
- Contract element verification in 10 minutes: Single-project efficiency improves by about 95%+
- Human-AI collaboration reduces hallucination risk: Key review points are checked one by one to reduce missed and incorrect reviews
- Review rules can be reused over the long term: Marginal cost keeps falling, making it suitable for financial legal review scenarios

subsections.title: 2.2 Classification Tags
content: **Industry**: Finance & Trade
**Category**: Risk Control
**Technology Category**: Agent, Large Language Model (LLM), Data Governance

subsections.title: 2.3 Implementation Cycle
content: - Demo development: 1 day

subsections.title: 2.4 Team Composition
content: - Demo phase: 1 consulting advisor, 1 Agent engineer

subsections.title: 2.5 Business Pain Points
content: - Low efficiency of manual review: A single project usually includes 5-6 contracts, and the traditional method requires about 3 person-days to complete a full review, with multiple people involved in handoffs and collaboration
- High risk of errors in manual verification: In high-intensity continuous review scenarios, the risk of missing or mischecking cross-contract elements rises significantly
- Rules are hard to accumulate and reuse: Review experience is highly dependent on individuals, making it difficult to form a standardized and modular review rule system
- Complex cross-document relationships: There are many implicit associations between contracts, and between contracts and supporting materials, making manual comparison extremely costly

subsections.title: 2.6 Core Functions
content: - Automatic extraction of contract elements: Automatically extracts key elements such as lender, amount, and number, while supporting manual correction and confirmation
- Cross-contract review rule checking: Based on a rule base, checks consistency and compliance across multiple contracts within the same project
- Configurable review rule management: Supports user-defined review points, risk levels, and contract type mappings
- Visualized display of review results: Original-text positioning of risk points, highlighting, and manual annotations
- Intelligent retrieval of similar contracts: Assists legal reviewers with horizontal comparison and decision support

subsections.title: 3.1.1 Reasons for Best Practice Selection
content: - Faster review: Full contract review can be compressed from about 3 person-days to about 30 minutes.
- More efficient verification: Contract element verification is shortened from about half a person-day to about 10 minutes, improving efficiency by 95%+.
- Better controlled risk: Human-AI collaboration and line-by-line rule scanning effectively reduce hallucinations, missed reviews, and incorrect reviews.
- High reuse value: Review rules can be continuously accumulated and reused, making the solution suitable for long-term operation in complex financial legal review.

subsections.title: 3.1.4 Metrics
content: **Core Business Metrics**
- Overall efficiency improvement in project-level contract review
- Significant reduction in manual verification time
- Continuous increase in reuse rate of review rules
- Review results are traceable and reviewable
**Core Technical Metrics**
- Accuracy of contract element extraction for key fields in financial legal review
- Accuracy of cross-document consistency judgment
- Line-by-line rule coverage rate to avoid missed reviews
- Controllability and stability under a human-AI collaboration workflow
**Other Value Returns**
- Promotes structured and systematic accumulation of financial legal review experience
- Provides a replicable pattern for subsequent risk control and compliance automation scenarios
